issues.description: High face density (6.7 faces/cm3) — may indicate tight internal radii
issues.suggestion: Verify minimum internal corner radius is >= 1mm for standard endmills

issues.description: High face density (6.7 faces/cm3) may indicate tight internal radii which could be challenging to machine accurately.
issues.suggestion: Consider using a higher resolution tool or additional passes to ensure precise machining of tight radii.
